post_cleanup_counts.cmd: docker exec memibrium-ruvector-db psql -U memory -d memory -tA -c "WITH locomo AS (SELECT id FROM memories WHERE domain LIKE 'locomo-%') SELECT 'locomo_count|' || count(*) FROM locomo UNION ALL SELECT 'temporal_expressions|' || count(*) FROM temporal_expressions WHERE memory_id IN (SELECT id FROM locomo) UNION ALL SELECT 'memory_snapshots|' || count(*) FROM memory_snapshots WHERE memory_id IN (SELECT id FROM locomo) UNION ALL SELECT 'user_feedback|' || count(*) FROM user_feedback WHERE memory_id IN (SELECT id FROM locomo) UNION ALL SELECT 'contradictions|' || count(*) FROM contradictions WHERE memory_a_id IN (SELECT id FROM locomo) OR memory_b_id IN (SELECT id FROM locomo) UNION ALL SELECT 'memory_edges|' || count(*) FROM memory_edges WHERE source_id IN (SELECT id FROM locomo) OR target_id IN (SELECT id FROM locomo);"
